summary: The user is preparing for a serious photoshoot and seeks tutorials on using their 50mm lens for portrait photography. They discuss their recent photography experiences, including the need for camera servicing and upgrading their camera bag, ultimately deciding on the Peak Design Everyday Backpack 20L. The session concludes with tips for editing portraits in Lightroom.
facts: The user has been using their 50mm lens non-stop since acquiring it three weeks ago and is happy with the results. The user has a Canon EOS 80D camera and is looking to get it serviced after six months since the last cleaning. The user is considering upgrading their worn-out camera bag and has been eyeing the Peak Design Everyday Backpack 20L. The user plans to edit photos from their last photoshoot with a subject named Sarah.
